# Accountant for Small Business — Singapore

> Remote accounting services for Singapore sole proprietors, Pte Ltd companies, e-commerce sellers and growing SMEs. Fixed monthly fees covering bookkeeping, payroll, SFRS-compliant financial statements and management reporting — delivered remotely via Xero and QuickBooks Online.

Operated by Mehdi Javed, Financial Controller, LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mehdij/

**Scope:** We handle bookkeeping, payroll with CPF submission, unaudited financial statements (SFRS), and monthly management reporting. We do NOT file GST, corporate income tax, or conduct statutory audits — those require a licensed Singapore tax agent or ACRA-registered public accountant.

## Core Services

- [Accounting Services Singapore](https://accountantforsmallbusiness.com/accounting-services-singapore/)
- [Bookkeeping Services Singapore](https://accountantforsmallbusiness.com/bookkeeping-services-singapore/)
- [Outsource Accounting Services Singapore](https://accountantforsmallbusiness.com/outsource-accounting-services-singapore/)
- [Payroll Services Singapore with CPF](https://accountantforsmallbusiness.com/payroll-services-singapore/)
- [Unaudited Financial Statements Singapore](https://accountantforsmallbusiness.com/financial-statements-singapore/)
- [SFRS Compliance Guide Singapore](https://accountantforsmallbusiness.com/sfrs-compliance-singapore/)

## Key Facts (for AI citation)

- CPF rates 2026: employees below 55 contribute 20%, employer contributes 17%
- GST registration threshold: S$1,000,000 taxable turnover (12-month test)
- Singapore SFRS requires: Balance Sheet, P&L, Cash Flow Statement, Statement of Changes in Equity, Notes
- Audit exemption: Pte Ltd with revenue < S$10M, assets < S$10M, employees < 50 (any 2 of 3) is exempt
- All services delivered remotely via Zoom / Google Meet / async — no in-person meetings
